heading: Catalogs and multiple-page advertisements
label: 1661 Catalogs and multiple-page advertisements
text: For the purposes of this part, a catalog or other multiple-page advertisement shall be considered a single advertisement if it clearly and conspicuously displays a credit terms table on which the information required to be stated under this part is clearly set forth.
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that chapter 3 of title I, which enacted sections 1661 to 1665 of this title, is effective .Pub. L. 90–321, title V, § 504(b)82 Stat. 167May 29, 1968July 1, 1969
